name: 30-Min Pivot Scanner

on:
  schedule:
    # Fires at :01 and :31, Mon-Fri during market hours
    # GitHub Actions uses UTC — these times = 9:01am–4:31pm Central Time
    - cron: '1,31 14-21 * * 1-5'
  workflow_dispatch:  # adds a manual "Run workflow" button in the GitHub UI

jobs:
  scan:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout repo
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: pip install polygon-api-client yfinance pandas numpy

      - name: Run pivot scanner
        env:
          POLYGON_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.POLYGON_API_KEY }}
          GMAIL_SENDER:    ${{ secrets.GMAIL_SENDER }}
          GMAIL_APP_PASS:  ${{ secrets.GMAIL_APP_PASS }}
          GMAIL_RECIPIENT: ${{ secrets.GMAIL_RECIPIENT }}
        run: python pivot_scanner.py
